---
title: "Prospective Students"
---

::: {.section-block}

::: {.intro-text}
We welcome students at all levels — PhD, Masters, Honours, and undergraduate — across our research areas. Browse projects below or get in touch with a supervisor directly to discuss ideas.
:::

## Available Projects

::: {.filter-section}

::: {.filter-bar}
[**Level:**]{.filter-label}
<button class="filter-btn active" data-filter-type="level" data-filter-value="all">All</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="level" data-filter-value="phd">PhD</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="level" data-filter-value="masters">Masters</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="level" data-filter-value="honours">Honours</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="level" data-filter-value="undergraduate">Undergraduate</button>
:::

::: {.filter-bar}
[**Topic:**]{.filter-label}
<button class="filter-btn active" data-filter-type="topic" data-filter-value="all">All</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="topic" data-filter-value="molecular-evolution">Molecular Evolution</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="topic" data-filter-value="language-culture">Language & Culture</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="topic" data-filter-value="macroevolution">Macroevolution</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="topic" data-filter-value="macroecology">Macroecology</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="topic" data-filter-value="biogeography">Biogeography</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="topic" data-filter-value="phylogenetics">Phylogenetics</button>
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter-type="topic" data-filter-value="conservation">Conservation</button>
:::

:::

<div id="projects-container">

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd honours masters" data-topics="macroevolution biogeography"}
### Biotic interchange during a major continental collision: Sunda and Sahul

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Masters]{.tag .tag-level} [Honours]{.tag .tag-level} [Macroevolution]{.tag .tag-topic} [Biogeography]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisor:** [Alex Skeels](people.qmd#alex-skeels)]{.project-supervisor}

The collision of the Sunda and Sahul tectonic plates created one of the most biodiverse regions on Earth. This project investigates how species have exchanged between these two landmasses over geological time, and what factors — including climate, ecology, and geography — have driven or impeded biotic interchange across Wallace's Line. Students will use phylogenetic comparative methods and biogeographic modelling. See: [Skeels et al. (2023) *Science* 381:86](https://doi.org/10.1126/science.adf7122).

[Personal website](https://alexskeels.github.io/) &ensp; [ANU profile](https://biology.anu.edu.au/people/alex-skeels)
:::

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd honours masters" data-topics="macroevolution phylogenetics"}
### Deep-time climate effects on extinction patterns from molecular phylogenies

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Masters]{.tag .tag-level} [Honours]{.tag .tag-level} [Macroevolution]{.tag .tag-topic} [Phylogenetics]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisor:** [Alex Skeels](people.qmd#alex-skeels)]{.project-supervisor}

How have past climate changes shaped the extinction and diversification of species over millions of years? This project uses time-calibrated molecular phylogenies to investigate the signatures of ancient climate-driven extinction events across plant and animal lineages.

[Personal website](https://alexskeels.github.io/) &ensp; [ANU profile](https://biology.anu.edu.au/people/alex-skeels)
:::

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd" data-topics="macroecology biogeography macroevolution"}
### Simulating the evolution of biodiversity in Australia

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Macroecology]{.tag .tag-topic} [Biogeography]{.tag .tag-topic} [Macroevolution]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisor:** [Alex Skeels](people.qmd#alex-skeels)]{.project-supervisor}

Australia's extraordinary biodiversity is the product of millions of years of environmental change — most importantly, the progressive aridification of the continent and the consequent restructuring of biome distributions. This project will aim to understand how these changes have shaped the diversity, endemism, and phylogenetic structure of Australian plants and animals, using simulation modelling tools including [Gen3sis](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pbio.3001340) (Hagen et al. 2021, *PLOS Biology*) and [DReAD](https://doi.org/10.1086/701125) (Skeels & Cardillo 2019, *American Naturalist*).

[Personal website](https://alexskeels.github.io/) &ensp; [ANU profile](https://biology.anu.edu.au/people/alex-skeels)
:::

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd honours masters" data-topics="molecular-evolution"}
### Projects in molecular evolution and mutation rates

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Masters]{.tag .tag-level} [Honours]{.tag .tag-level} [Molecular Evolution]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisor:** [Lindell Bromham](people.qmd#lindell-bromham)]{.project-supervisor}

Lindell's group works on the causes and consequences of variation in molecular evolutionary rates — from mutation rates to substitution rates across the tree of life. Projects are available at PhD, Masters, and Honours level. Contact Lindell to discuss specific project ideas.

[ANU profile](https://biology.anu.edu.au/people/lindell-bromham) &ensp; [Personal website](https://lindellbromham.com/)
:::

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd honours masters" data-topics="language-culture"}
### Projects in language evolution and linguistic diversity

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Masters]{.tag .tag-level} [Honours]{.tag .tag-level} [Language & Culture]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisors:** [Lindell Bromham](people.qmd#lindell-bromham) &amp; [Sam Passmore](people.qmd#sam-passmore)]{.project-supervisor}

Projects applying evolutionary and phylogenetic methods to understand patterns of language change, linguistic diversity, and cultural evolution. Topics include language complexity, population size effects, and the relationship between biological and cultural evolution.

[Lindell's ANU profile](https://biology.anu.edu.au/people/lindell-bromham) &ensp; [Sam's personal website](https://www.sampassmore.com/)
:::

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd honours masters" data-topics="macroevolution biogeography conservation phylogenetics"}
### Projects in macroevolution and biogeography

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Masters]{.tag .tag-level} [Honours]{.tag .tag-level} [Macroevolution]{.tag .tag-topic} [Biogeography]{.tag .tag-topic} [Phylogenetics]{.tag .tag-topic} [Conservation]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisor:** [Marcel Cardillo](people.qmd#marcel-cardillo)]{.project-supervisor}

Marcel's group studies the evolutionary processes that have shaped global biodiversity patterns, and how evolutionary history influences species' vulnerability to human impacts. Projects span phylogenetics, model-based biogeography, and extinction risk modelling.

[ANU profile](https://biology.anu.edu.au/people/marcel-cardillo)
:::

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd honours masters" data-topics="conservation"}
### Projects in species declines and extinction prevention

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Masters]{.tag .tag-level} [Honours]{.tag .tag-level} [Conservation]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisor:** [Ben Scheele](people.qmd#ben-scheele)]{.project-supervisor}

Ben's research focuses on understanding the mechanisms driving species declines — from disease to habitat loss — and using this knowledge to prevent extinctions. Projects available in amphibian biology, threatened species ecology, and conservation planning.

[ANU profile](https://fennerschool.anu.edu.au/people/benjamin-scheele)
:::

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd honours masters" data-topics="molecular-evolution macroevolution phylogenetics"}
### Projects in mathematical and statistical approaches to evolution

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Masters]{.tag .tag-level} [Honours]{.tag .tag-level} [Molecular Evolution]{.tag .tag-topic} [Macroevolution]{.tag .tag-topic} [Phylogenetics]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisor:** [Xia Hua](people.qmd#xia-hua)]{.project-supervisor}

Xia develops mathematical models to understand evolutionary processes including speciation, molecular evolution, and diversification. Projects suitable for students with strong quantitative backgrounds.

[ANU profile](https://msi.anu.edu.au/people/xia-hua)
:::

::: {.student-project data-levels="phd honours masters" data-topics="phylogenetics macroevolution molecular-evolution"}
### Projects in phylogenetic methods and diversification

::: {.project-tags}
[PhD]{.tag .tag-level} [Masters]{.tag .tag-level} [Honours]{.tag .tag-level} [Phylogenetics]{.tag .tag-topic} [Macroevolution]{.tag .tag-topic} [Molecular Evolution]{.tag .tag-topic}
:::

[**Supervisor:** [Jordan Douglas](people.qmd#jordan-douglas)]{.project-supervisor}

Jordan develops and applies phylogenetic methods — including molecular clocks and speciation models — to study evolutionary and ecological drivers of diversification. Contact Jordan to discuss available projects.

[ANU profile](https://biology.anu.edu.au/people/jordan-douglas)
:::

</div>

<div id="no-results" style="display:none; padding: 1rem; color: #888; font-style: italic;">
No projects match the selected filters. Try a different combination or <a href="mailto:macroevoeco@anu.edu.au">get in touch</a>.
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {

  // ── Shuffle student project cards ────────────────────────────────────────
  var container = document.getElementById('projects-container');
  if (container) {
    var cards = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll(':scope > .student-project'));
    var anchor = cards[cards.length - 1].nextSibling;
    cards.forEach(function (c) { container.removeChild(c); });
    for (var i = cards.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
      var j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
      var tmp = cards[i]; cards[i] = cards[j]; cards[j] = tmp;
    }
    cards.forEach(function (c) { container.insertBefore(c, anchor); });
  }

  var activeLevel = 'all';
  var activeTopic = 'all';

  function applyFilters() {
    var projects = document.querySelectorAll('#projects-container > .student-project');
    var visible = 0;
    projects.forEach(function (el) {
      var levels = (el.dataset.levels || '').split(' ');
      var topics = (el.dataset.topics || '').split(' ');
      var levelMatch = activeLevel === 'all' || levels.indexOf(activeLevel) !== -1;
      var topicMatch = activeTopic === 'all' || topics.indexOf(activeTopic) !== -1;
      if (levelMatch && topicMatch) {
        el.classList.remove('hidden');
        visible++;
      } else {
        el.classList.add('hidden');
      }
    });
    var noResults = document.getElementById('no-results');
    if (noResults) noResults.style.display = visible === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(function (btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
      var type  = btn.dataset.filterType;
      var value = btn.dataset.filterValue;

      // Update active button in this filter bar
      btn.closest('.filter-bar').querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(function (b) {
        b.classList.remove('active');
      });
      btn.classList.add('active');

      if (type === 'level') activeLevel = value;
      if (type === 'topic') activeTopic = value;
      applyFilters();
    });
  });
});
</script>

## How to apply

### PhD

- [ANU HDR admissions](https://www.anu.edu.au/study/apply/hdr-domestic)
- [ANU International Research Scholarships](https://www.anu.edu.au/study/scholarships)

### Honours and Masters

- [Research School of Biology](https://biology.anu.edu.au/education/honours)
- [Fenner School of Environment & Society](https://fennerschool.anu.edu.au/study/masters-environment)
- [Mathematical Sciences Institute](https://msi.anu.edu.au/study)

## Get in touch

Interested in joining the lab? Email the relevant supervisor directly, or contact us at the Research School of Biology.

:::
